goal: Wire ship draft into CLI (run-ship-draft subcommand), add auto-infer to run-ship-complete, gitignore work-order runtime files, and update /ship command to use draft-driven flow.

tasks.name: Add run-ship-draft CLI and auto-infer on run-ship-complete
tasks.action: Add cmd_run_ship_draft function and argparse registration for run-ship-draft subcommand. Accepts feature slug, outputs build_ship_draft result as JSON or formatted table. Modify cmd_run_ship_complete to make commit positional arg optional (nargs='?'). When commit is omitted, auto-infer: check current branch matches feature/<feature>, run git rev-parse HEAD, verify unambiguous run. Fail closed if any guard fails. Add tests.
microSteps: Add cmd_run_ship_draft(args) — call build_ship_draft, format as JSON or compact table
Register run-ship-draft in argparse subparsers with feature arg and --json flag
Add to dispatch dict and read-only commands list
Modify run-ship-complete argparse: change commit from positional to optional (nargs='?', default=None)
In cmd_run_ship_complete: when commit is None, check branch matches feature/<feature>, run git rev-parse HEAD via subprocess, verify single latest run. If any guard fails, print error and exit 1
Error path: auto-infer on wrong branch prints clear error message
Error path: auto-infer with ambiguous run prints clear error message
Write tests/test_ship_draft_cli.py covering run-ship-draft output, auto-infer success, auto-infer guard failures

tasks.name: Gitignore work-order runtime files and update /ship command
tasks.action: Add .cnogo/work-orders/*.json (not .gitkeep), .cnogo/runs/, and .cnogo/feature-phases.json to .gitignore so runtime state is never committed. Update ship.md to use run-ship-draft --json for commit surface, commit message, and PR body. Replace manual git add -A with draft-guided git add of specific files. Replace manual gh pr create with draft-provided title and body. Replace manual run-ship-complete with auto-infer version. Keep each step visible but pre-computed from draft output.
microSteps: Add .cnogo/work-orders/*.json, !.cnogo/work-orders/.gitkeep, .cnogo/runs/, .cnogo/feature-phases.json to .gitignore under a Ship runtime section
Rewrite ship.md Step 2 to use run-ship-draft --json for commit surface and message
Rewrite ship.md Step 4 to use draft prTitle and prBody for gh pr create
Rewrite ship.md Step 4a to use auto-infer run-ship-complete (no manual commit SHA or branch args)
Keep Step 0, Step 1, Step 1a, Step 5-7 unchanged
Verify ship.md is clear about fallback to manual mode if draft is unavailable

tdd.reason: Markdown command file and .gitignore — verified by workflow_validate.py and grep checks

commitMessage:
feat(workflow): add ship draft CLI, auto-infer, and guided /ship

Wire run-ship-draft CLI subcommand, add auto-infer to
run-ship-complete, gitignore work-order runtime files, and
update /ship to use draft-driven flow.
